meaning: n.目的地,[计] 目的文件,目的单元格
examples: Our luggage was checked all the way through to our final destination.
At last, after twenty hours on the boat, they arrived at their destination.
He gets you to your destination without turning the trip into a white-knuckle experience.
But Hudson did not become a quirky weekend destination by ignoring its sordid history.
That puts it at a permanent disadvantage as a holiday destination to nearby Turkey, for example.
